seo.title: Kadhal Niagara Lyrics En Swasa Kaatre

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Niagara?

The song captures the essence of romantic love with a soothing and melodious tune.

Who composed the music for En Swasa Kaatre?

The music for En Swasa Kaatre was composed by AR Rahman.

Who are the singers of Kadhal Niagara?

The song is sung by Harini and Palakkad Sriram.

What is the release year of En Swasa Kaatre?

The movie En Swasa Kaatre was released in 1999.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kadhal Niagara?

The lyrics were penned by the legendary Vaali.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie En Swasa Kaatre, the song Kadhal Niagara beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and longing. Sung by Harini and Palakkad Sriram, the melody is soothing and romantic, perfectly complementing the film's narrative. AR Rahman's composition, combined with Vaali's poetic lyrics, creates a captivating experience that resonates with the heart. The song evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a timeless piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kadhal Niagara from the movie En Swasa Kaatre, where AR Rahman's magical composition meets the soulful voices of Harini and Palakkad Sriram. This romantic duet, penned by the legendary Vaali, captures the essence of love with its soothing and melodious tune. Dive into a world of emotions with this unforgettable musical masterpiece.
stanzaMeanings: A butterfly is fluttering and jumping, isn't it cool today? Love Niagara, don't pull my life love, I don't need it.
A butterfly is fluttering and jumping with my heart today.
A butterfly is fluttering and jumping with my heart, this is the time I prepare.
This land is set aside for you, isn't this country made for you?
This land is set aside for me, isn't that night time for it?
The desires formed in you, my love, are like onions that don't reduce in price.
Isn't it cool today? Love Niagara, don't pull my life love, I don't need it, Viagra.
New blood, a kiss on the lips, come and get used to it, say, say, you say, my love.
Make a request today, eyes will answer later.
Will the day come when I get an answer? Oh dear, are you the government?
When will my desires come true? Who can say, will the Kaveri become water?
Isn't it cool today? Love Niagara, don't pull my life love, I don't need it, Viagra.
